meaning: vt.解救,保存,保全,保留,节省,储蓄vi.挽救,节省,救球 prep.除...之外n.救球 /v.[计]保存/更新
examples: It's too late to save her now.
We'll take a cab to save time.
We should try to save water.
In many cultures, people of very limited means save a great amount of money.
The UK MEP Andrew Duff spoke of "a critical year to save the EU".
